features.name: chain of OR'd equality comparisons on multi-bit signal against odd hex constants
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit signal compared against multiple odd hex constants using equality operators, combined with OR
features.snippet:
input [2:0] c;
assign out = c == 8'h1 | c == 8'h3 | c == 8'h5 | c == 8'h7;
